================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 45 5B CE 62 E4
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1831
Reflected CC   : 0x0A
RetType        : 0x02
RetCode        : -1073676235
RetValSize     : 0

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1831
ReflectedCC  : 0x0A
PayloadLen   : 0

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1831

[PAYLOAD HEX]

[RETURN VALUE]

[BINARY DATA]
